anatomy.description: Full-width venue photo at the top of the card. Includes fallback display when no image is available.
Badge Partner instance overlaid on the image. Only visible when Partner=True. Communicates booking type.
Venue name. Bold text, primary identifier.
Star icon, numeric rating, and review count.

values.description: Shows Badge Partner badge overlaid on the venue image.
No badge. Standard card without booking capability indicator.

sizeNote: Single size only. Approximate dimensions: 200 × 248px. No size variants.
stateNote: No interactive states at the component level. Tap/press state is handled by the parent container.

dimensions.note: Approximate dimensions extracted from Figma. Exact values depend on responsive container.

usageContext: Grids, lists, and carousels of venue results.
